ol.li:
Snapshot Visibility Rule:
A version is visible if CommitTS <= SnapshotID AND VersionID is not in the In-Flight list.

WAL Append (APPEND_PRIVATE):
Writes are kept in a per-connection delta-buffer (Shadow Pages) to prevent "Dirty Reads".

Validation Logic (First-Writer-Wins):
At commit time, the WAL is scanned for any entries where Key == ModifiedKey and CommitTS > StartTS.
If detected, the transaction must ABORT with a Serialization Failure.

Physical Write Path:
MERGE_TO_MAIN_LOG requires a synchronous write to the journal before the Client receives the ACK.

g.title: Initiates ACID transactions with Snapshot Isolation
Manages Snapshot IDs and Commit/Abort logic
Write-Ahead Log containing multi-version delta records

g.text: UPDATE users SET val='Bob' WHERE id=1
